trans-unit.source: Sorry, this "How do I" (HDI) example must be used with a newer version of 4D ({version} and above)
trans-unit.target: Sorry, this "How do I" (HDI) example must be used with a newer version of 4D ({version} and above)

trans-unit.source: Do not attempt to open this HDI in design mode using this version; if you do so, forms and/or methods could be altered because of missing functionality.
trans-unit.target: Do not attempt to open this HDI in design mode using this version; if you do so, forms and/or methods could be altered because of missing functionality.

trans-unit.source: Do you know how to use JSON pointers in objects?
trans-unit.target: Do you know how to use JSON pointers in objects?

trans-unit.source: Sorry, this "How do I" (HDI) example demonstrates a 4D View Pro feature.
trans-unit.target: Sorry, this "How do I" (HDI) example demonstrates a 4D View Pro feature.

trans-unit.source: You must have a valid 4D View Pro license to continue.
trans-unit.target: You must have a valid 4D View Pro license to continue.

trans-unit.source: Sorry, this "How do I" (HDI) example demonstrates a 4D Write Pro feature.
trans-unit.target: Sorry, this "How do I" (HDI) example demonstrates a 4D Write Pro feature.

trans-unit.source: You must have a valid 4D Write Pro license to continue.
trans-unit.target: You must have a valid 4D Write Pro license to continue.
